title: Elytra Lunge
description: Allows the "Lunge" enchantment to work while gliding with an elytra
body:
## Elytra Lunge
**Makes a Spear with the Lunge Enchantment able to work when gliding with Elytra!**

_No config necessary - add this to your world and you're good to go o7_

---
- Mojang added a check to the lunge.json file to stop the player from lunging while gliding with an Elytra :(
- I took that out :)

Includes a reload message that's broadcasted to game chat whenever the datapack is successfully initialized (this message can be disabled by clicking the message in chat!)

_Thx for checking out my datapack!_ - DRE
